title: Managing Your Inbox
drDigitalIntro: Email adds up fast. Create folders for topics (Recipes, Bills, Work). Search Mail for specific senders or subjects. Mark emails as unread if you need to handle them later. Unsubscribe from newsletters you don't read — look for an Unsubscribe link at the bottom. Delete emails you don't need. Archive important emails for later. A clean Inbox makes it easier to find what you need.

playgroundTask.instructions: Decide what to do with each email.

drDigitalSuccess: Great inbox management! Action items stay in Inbox, records get archived, junk gets deleted.
drDigitalHint: Ask yourself: do I need to act on this? Keep it. Might need to reference it? Archive it. Neither? Delete it.
